name: SP2 十一封未烧的信·诺（人物传VOL.1）
desc: 2026 暑假特辑·人物传 VOL.1 高级档（传主：诺） · 15 道自包含单选（宾从语序/感叹/since/情态推测/as…as/被动/完成被动/whose/分词/倒装/过去完成/反义疑问/图证反选）。传记阅读与菀的答卷在纸卷上。

ops: does she never burn the letters

m5.why: What a + adj + 单数名词。

m5.q: 8. Nuo has kept the letters ___ she was eleven.
9. The writer can't ___ a stranger — every letter knows her favourite star.
m5.why: 情态动词后接原形 be。

m5.q: 10. No one in the valley watches as ___ as Nuo.
11. On clear nights, the stars ___ best from her window.
12. The letters on the wall ___ for eleven years.
m5.why: for eleven years+被动 → 现在完成被动。

m5.q: 13. The eleven letters show ___ the friendship has lasted.
m5.why: 一年一封记录的是时长。

m5.q: 14. All eleven letters ___ unburned on the wall.
m5.why: letters 复数 + remain 系动词=保持。

m5.q: 15. The empty chair, ___ owner left years ago, still faces the desk.
m5.why: '它的'主人 → 关系代词所有格 whose。

m5.q: 16. ___ open on the desk, the last letter seems to be waiting for an answer.
m5.why: 信与 leave 是被动关系 → Left。

m5.q: 17. Above the desk ___ a map of stars.
m5.why: 完全倒装，主语 a map 单数 → hangs。

m5.q: 18. When the candle went out, Nuo ___ the last letter three times already.
m5.why: 在 went out 之前完成 → had read。

m5.q: 19. Let's count the stars from Nuo's window tonight, ___?
m5.why: Let's 开头的附加疑问用 shall we。

m5.q: 20. 对照观星房再读四句——只有一句有语法错误。选出【错误】的一句：
ops: Every letters on the wall has a pin.
The candle on the desk has gone out.
What hangs above the desk is a map of stars.
Eleven letters stay pinned above the desk.
m5.why: every 后接单数 → Every letter has。
